title: 2024 Season Recap: A Memorable Year on the Kenai and Kasilof Rivers
summary: The 2024 season was one for the books, showcasing incredible fishing, ideal weather, and unforgettable moments for anglers of all experience levels. Here’s a look back at this year’s highlights, from salmon and trout fishing to the overall conditions. May/June Salmon Fishing The season began with slower action for...
